name: Salvador Allende
role: President (1970–1973) — Unidad Popular; first elected Marxist head of government
quote: Se abrirán las grandes alamedas por donde pase el hombre libre, para construir una sociedad mejor. (The great avenues will open where free men will walk to build a better society.)

name: Augusto Pinochet
role: Military Junta Leader & President (1973–1990); convicted posthumously in 300+ criminal cases
quote: Soy partidario de la ley fuerte... No soy partidario de matar a nadie... pero si es necesario, lo haré. (I favor strong law... I am not in favor of killing anyone... but if necessary, I will.)

name: Bernardo O'Higgins
role: Supreme Director (1817–1823) — Father of the Nation; declared independence
quote: O cubrirse de gloria, o abrir el paso a la muerte. (Either be covered in glory, or open the way to death.)

name: Diego Portales
role: Minister (1830s) — Architect of Conservative Constitutional Order; assassinated 1837
quote: El orden social se mantiene en Chile por el peso de la noche y porque no tenemos hombres sutiles, hábiles y cosquillosos. (Social order in Chile is maintained by the weight of night and because we don't have subtle, skilled, and oversensitive men.)

name: Arturo Prat
role: Naval Captain — Hero of Battle of Iquique (May 21, 1879); national icon
quote: Muchachos, la contienda es desigual, pero ánimo y valor, y nunca que se rinda el barco que está confiado a mi defensa. (Boys, the fight is unequal, but courage and valor, and never let the ship entrusted to my defense surrender.)

name: José Manuel Balmaceda
role: President (1886–1891) — Led government in Civil War; committed suicide in Argentine embassy
quote: No quiero ser un obstáculo a la paz. Entrego mi vida con la conciencia de haber servido a la patria. (I do not want to be an obstacle to peace. I give my life with the conscience of having served the nation.)

name: Eduardo Frei Montalva
role: President (1964–1970) — Christian Democracy's 'Revolution in Liberty'
quote: Cuando un pueblo sufre y espera justicia, el Estado tiene el deber de responder con los instrumentos del progreso. (When a people suffers and awaits justice, the State has a duty to respond with the instruments of progress.)

name: Pedro Aguirre Cerda
role: President (1938–1941) — Popular Front; founded CORFO; 'Gobernar es educar'
quote: Gobernar es educar. (To govern is to educate.)

name: Patricio Aylwin
role: President (1990–1994) — First post-Pinochet president; established Rettig Commission
quote: Pido perdón en nombre del Estado de Chile a las víctimas y sus familias. (I ask forgiveness in the name of the Chilean State to victims and their families.)

name: Ricardo Lagos
role: President (2000–2006) — Socialist; established Valech Commission; reformed 1980 Constitution
quote: Chile tiene hoy una Constitución democrática, firmada por todos los chilenos. (Chile today has a democratic constitution, signed by all Chileans.)

name: Michelle Bachelet
role: President (2006–2010, 2014–2018); UN Human Rights High Commissioner (2018–2022)
quote: Soy mujer, soy laica, soy separada. No represento el Chile de siempre. (I am a woman, secular, separated. I don't represent the Chile of always.)

name: Sebastián Piñera
role: President (2010–2014, 2018–2022); billionaire; died February 2024 in helicopter crash
quote: Estamos en guerra contra un enemigo poderoso e implacable. (We are at war against a powerful and implacable enemy.) [October 20, 2019]

name: Gabriel Boric
role: President (2022–present) — Youngest Chilean president; Frente Amplio; Apruebo Dignidad coalition
quote: Si Chile fue la cuna del neoliberalismo, también será su tumba. (If Chile was the cradle of neoliberalism, it will also be its grave.)

name: Víctor Jara
role: Folk singer, theater director, UP activist — tortured and executed Estadio Chile, September 16, 1973
quote: Somos cinco mil / aquí en esta pequeña parte de la ciudad. / ¿Cuántos somos en total en las ciudades y en todo el país? (We are five thousand / here in this small part of the city. / How many are we in total in the cities and throughout the country?) [poem written in captivity]

name: Elisa Loncón
role: President, Constitutional Convention (2021–2022); Mapuche scholar and linguist
quote: Esta Convención va a refundar Chile sobre la base de la plurinacionalidad, la paridad, el respeto a los pueblos indígenas. (This Convention will refound Chile on the basis of plurinationality, parity, and respect for indigenous peoples.)

name: Camila Vallejo
role: FECH student leader (2010); Communist Party congresswoman; Minister-Secretary General (2022–)
quote: Somos una generación que no tiene miedo a las grandes transformaciones sociales. (We are a generation that is not afraid of great social transformations.)

name: Manuel Contreras
role: DINA Director (1974–1977); convicted of crimes against humanity; died in prison 2015
quote: Cumplí con mi deber al mando de la DINA, siguiendo órdenes del presidente de la República. (I fulfilled my duty commanding DINA, following orders from the president of the Republic.)

name: José Antonio Kast
role: Partido Republicano Leader; far-right 2021 presidential candidate (47.8% in runoff vs Boric)
quote: Chile tiene que volver al orden, a la seguridad y a la libertad económica sin la cual no hay desarrollo posible. (Chile needs to return to order, security, and economic freedom without which there is no possible development.)

name: Sergio de Castro
role: Finance Minister (1977–1982) — Leader of Chicago Boys neoliberal reforms
quote: Éramos conscientes de que estábamos cambiando el sistema, no sólo corrigiendo algunos errores del modelo económico anterior. (We were aware that we were changing the system, not just correcting some errors of the previous economic model.)

name: Coñuepán / CAM leadership (collective)
role: Coordinadora Arauco Malleco — militant Mapuche territorial resistance organization
quote: La tierra no se vende, se defiende y se recupera. (Land is not sold, it is defended and recovered.) [Mapuche movement slogan]
